error_signature: WebSocket connection is missing at ChatService.startSession
title: WebSocket connection missing in n8n on AWS Fargate
symptom: The log shows 'WebSocket connection is missing at ChatService.startSession', indicating a failure in establishing a WebSocket connection.
not_this_if: Using a different backend for push notifications
root_cause: The error occurs when the WebSocket handshake fails, often due to missing headers or configurations that prevent the connection from being established properly. This can happen if the reverse proxy or load balancer is not configured to support WebSocket connections.
fix_steps: Access the task definition for your n8n service in AWS Fargate
agent_instruction: Update the n8n task definition to include N8N_PUSH_BACKEND=websocket and redeploy.
